pages.text: The $(item)Large Mushroom Skyseed$() — both mushrooms again, grown into a giant grove.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A great mycelium isle crowded with giant mushrooms — many more huge caps than the standard island, and a herd of mooshrooms beneath them.
$(bold)Red, brown, or mixed$()$(br)As with the standard island it rolls a red, brown, or mixed grove — but on this scale it reads as a true mushroom forest.
